Handles BLE app launch services and defines related functions, types, and UUIDs.


## Files
- **[app_launch.c](app_launch.c.md)**: Handles BLE app launch services, including discovery, disconnection, and characteristic operations.
- **[app_launch.h](app_launch.h.md)**: Functions and types for handling BLE characteristics related to app launch services.
- **[app_launch_definition.h](app_launch_definition.h.md)**: Defines UUIDs for the app launch service and its characteristics in a Bluetooth context.
